Key differences:
- Target has the first column filled, while Distractor 1 has it empty
- Target has only one filled column on the left (column 1), while Distractor 2 has two filled columns on the left (columns 1-2)
- Target has two empty columns in the middle (columns 2-3), Distractor 1 has three empty columns (1-3), and Distractor 2 has one empty column (column 3)

A good description: "The grid with a single filled column on the left, followed by two empty columns, and two filled columns on the right"

Or: "The grid with the first column filled, the second and third columns empty, and the fourth and fifth columns filled"

content.text: Expression: A grid with a single filled column on the left, followed by two empty columns in the middle, and two filled columns on the right.
